temporal_description: In a dimly lit, cavernous hall with stone pillars and a grand staircase in the background, three young people are engaged in a tense conversation. On the left, a young man with dark hair and glasses, wearing a brown jacket, gestures with his hand as he speaks urgently to the man on the right. In the center, a young woman with long brown hair looks on with a concerned and worried expression. The man on the right, seen from the back, wears a dark, patterned sweater and listens intently. The camera is positioned in a medium shot, capturing the emotional exchange between the characters. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. A young man speaks in a panicked and urgent tone, his voice filled with desperation and a sense of impending doom. He asks, "你看到卢娜了吗？" (Did you see Luna?). The camera angle shifts slightly, focusing more on the young man with glasses. He continues to speak with an intense and pleading look, his hand still extended. The young woman remains in the frame, her expression unchanged, watching the interaction. The man on the right is still visible, his back to the camera. The subtitles change, but the setting and the characters' positions remain consistent. He continues, "卢娜？" (Luna?). His voice rises in pitch and speed as he explains his predicament with growing anxiety, "我要找她表白，到了天亮可能我们都死了，没机会了。" (I have to confess my feelings to her. By the time the light comes, we might both be dead, no chance left.). The background is filled with the low, ambient sounds of a large, echoing space, suggesting a grand hall or cathedral, which amplifies the gravity of the moment. The camera zooms in slightly, tightening the focus on the young man with glasses and the young woman. The man on the right is now mostly out of frame. The young man's face is filled with desperation as he speaks, while the young woman's worried gaze is fixed on him. The subtitles at the bottom of the screen change again, reflecting the ongoing dialogue. The watermark remains in the top right corner.
